content: يَعني، اَلنَّاس حَذَّرَتْه مِن اَلطَّريق اَلصَّحراَوِي وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ سَافَرَ عَلَيْهِ
translations: eng:well, people warned him about the desert road nevertheless he travelled on it

transcriptions.arabizi: yaAny, ilnaes hazarit|uh min iltaree' ilsahraawi wa maAa zalik saefir Aala|yh
